target_name: Solace Browser Fun Packs — All Locales Present (Northstar)
context: Northstar contract: at least 13 fun packs (one per locale) must be installed; default-en is the baseline. Elisabeth Hendrickson: charter-based exploration of delight — if the API can't list what's installed, users can't discover or switch personality packs. Verify packs array contains default-en with non-zero joke/fact counts.
